title: Connector Manifest
description: Canonical manifest contract for data-connectors. Every *-playwright.json file must validate against this schema.

manifest_version.description: Version of this manifest schema itself. Independent of connector version.

connector_id.description: Globally unique connector artifact id, e.g. 'instagram-playwright'.

source_id.description: Stable product-facing source id, e.g. 'instagram'. Must not change across releases without a versioned migration path.

version.description: Connector version (semver). Independent of manifest_version, page_api_version, and scope schema versions.

page_api_version.description: Major version of the page API this connector requires. Independent of connector version.

connect_url.description: Login / start URL for the platform.

connect_selector.description: CSS selector that is visible only when the user is logged in.

icon.description: Path to the canonical connector icon relative to the connector directory (for example "icons/github.svg").

schema.description: Optional external cross-reference schema URI (e.g. https://schema.org/NutritionInformation). Distinct from the JSON Schema the scope payload validates against.

runtime_requirements.description: Declarative runtime constraints. Runners use this for feature detection.

capabilities.description: Optional feature flags the connector needs. Runners may reject connectors whose capabilities they do not support.

connectURL.description: Legacy alias for connect_url. Kept for backward compatibility during migration.

connectSelector.description: Legacy alias for connect_selector. Kept for backward compatibility during migration.

iconURL.description: Legacy alias for icon. Kept for backward compatibility during migration.

id.description: Legacy alias for connector_id. Kept for backward compatibility during migration.

exportFrequency.description: Legacy field; shell-specific concern, will move to per-shell overlays in a future manifest_version.

vectorize_config.description: Legacy field; shell-specific concern, will move to per-shell overlays in a future manifest_version.
